cards.name: Qualità dell'aria
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Card qualità aria: AQI con zone colorate, classificazione, grafico 24h smooth.
cards.description_en: Air quality card: AQI with colored zones, classification, smooth 24h chart.
cards.description_de: Luftqualitätskarte: AQI mit farbigen Zonen, Klassifizierung, geglättetes 24h-Diagramm.
cards.description_es: Tarjeta de calidad del aire: AQI con zonas de colores, clasificación, gráfico suavizado de 24h.
cards.description_fr: Carte qualité de l'air : IQA avec zones colorées, classification, graphique lissé sur 24h.

cards.name: Climatizzatore
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Controllo completo climatizzatore HA: power, modalità (cool/heat/auto/dry/fan), target ±, fan speed, temperatura corrente e umidità. Icona animata e tema colore dinamico per modalità attiva.
cards.description_en: Full HA air conditioner control: power, modes (cool/heat/auto/dry/fan), target ±, fan speed, current temperature and humidity. Animated icon and dynamic color theme for active mode.
cards.description_de: Vollständige HA-Klimaanlagensteuerung: Ein/Aus, Modi (cool/heat/auto/dry/fan), Zieltemperatur ±, Lüftergeschwindigkeit, Temperatur und Luftfeuchtigkeit. Animiertes Symbol und dynamisches Farbthema je Modus.
cards.description_es: Control completo del climatizador HA: encendido, modos (cool/heat/auto/dry/fan), temperatura objetivo ±, velocidad del ventilador, temperatura actual y humedad. Icono animado y tema de color dinámico según el modo activo.
cards.description_fr: Contrôle complet du climatiseur HA : marche/arrêt, modes (cool/heat/auto/dry/fan), consigne ±, vitesse du ventilateur, température et humidité actuelles. Icône animée et thème de couleur dynamique selon le mode actif.

cards.name: Clock
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Orologio digitale con ticks counter. Dimostra useCardConfig e useStyles.
cards.description_en: Digital clock with tick counter. Demonstrates useCardConfig and useStyles.
cards.description_de: Digitale Uhr mit Tick-Zähler. Demonstriert useCardConfig und useStyles.
cards.description_es: Reloj digital con contador de ticks. Demuestra useCardConfig y useStyles.
cards.description_fr: Horloge numérique avec compteur de ticks. Illustre useCardConfig et useStyles.

cards.name: Light Control
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Controllo luce HA: on/off, luminosità e colore con sezioni disattivabili.
cards.description_en: HA light control: on/off, brightness and color with toggleable sections.
cards.description_de: HA-Lichtsteuerung: Ein/Aus, Helligkeit und Farbe mit umschaltbaren Bereichen.
cards.description_es: Control de luz HA: encendido/apagado, brillo y color con secciones desactivables.
cards.description_fr: Contrôle lumière HA : allumage/extinction, luminosité et couleur avec sections désactivables.

cards.name: Persona
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Card persona HA: avatar, zona, batteria, passi/km guidati. Layout split con mappa Google Maps live sul lato destro (sfumatura graduale tra info e mappa), campo dedicato per il device_tracker GPS, badge LIVE animato.
cards.description_en: HA person card: avatar, zone, battery, steps/driven km. Split layout with live Google Maps on the right (gradient between info and map), dedicated GPS device_tracker field, animated LIVE badge.
cards.description_de: HA-Personenkarte: Avatar, Zone, Akku, Schritte/gefahrene km. Geteiltes Layout mit Google Maps live (rechts), dediziertes GPS-device_tracker-Feld, animiertes LIVE-Abzeichen.
cards.description_es: Tarjeta de persona HA: avatar, zona, batería, pasos/km recorridos. Diseño dividido con Google Maps en vivo (derecha), campo GPS device_tracker dedicado, badge LIVE animado.
cards.description_fr: Carte personne HA : avatar, zone, batterie, pas/km parcourus. Mise en page divisée avec Google Maps en direct (droite), champ GPS device_tracker dédié, badge LIVE animé.

cards.name: Room Sensor
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Card sensore stanza: gauge multipli, flow chart storico, badge numerici, mini-gauge batteria/segnale.
cards.description_en: Room sensor card: multiple gauges, history flow chart, numeric badges, mini battery/signal gauges.
cards.description_de: Raumsensorkarte: mehrere Anzeigen, historisches Flussdiagramm, numerische Abzeichen, Mini-Akku-/Signalmesser.
cards.description_es: Tarjeta de sensor de habitación: varios indicadores, gráfico histórico de flujo, badges numéricos, mini-indicadores de batería/señal.
cards.description_fr: Carte capteur de pièce : plusieurs jauges, graphique de flux historique, badges numériques, mini-jauges batterie/signal.

cards.name: Termostato
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Gauge 270° con gradiente blu→arancione per termostato HA. Slider target, toggle on/off, multi-mode.
cards.description_en: 270° gauge with blue→orange gradient for HA thermostat. Target slider, on/off toggle, multi-mode.
cards.description_de: 270°-Anzeige mit blau→orange-Verlauf für HA-Thermostat. Ziel-Schieberegler, Ein/Aus-Schalter, Multi-Mode.
cards.description_es: Indicador de 270° con degradado azul→naranja para termostato HA. Deslizador de consigna, interruptor on/off, multi-modo.
cards.description_fr: Jauge 270° avec dégradé bleu→orange pour thermostat HA. Curseur de consigne, interrupteur on/off, multi-mode.

cards.name: Tigo Panels
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Monitor real-time ottimizzatori Tigo: griglia celle pulsanti per potenza istantanea di ogni pannello.
cards.description_en: Real-time Tigo optimizer monitor: button grid showing instantaneous power for each panel.
cards.description_de: Echtzeit-Monitor für Tigo-Optimierer: Schaltflächenraster mit Momentanleistung jedes Panels.
cards.description_es: Monitor en tiempo real de optimizadores Tigo: cuadrícula de botones con potencia instantánea de cada panel.
cards.description_fr: Moniteur temps réel des optimiseurs Tigo : grille de boutons affichant la puissance instantanée de chaque panneau.

cards.name: Dreame Vacuum
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Card Dreame Vacuum con UI ispirata all'app ufficiale: mappa, sheet di pulizia (CleanGenius/Personalizza), base stazione, impostazioni MopExtend™.
cards.description_en: Dreame Vacuum card with app-inspired UI: map, cleaning sheet (CleanGenius/Customize), base station, MopExtend™ settings.
cards.description_de: Dreame Vacuum-Karte mit App-inspirierter Oberfläche: Karte, Reinigungsblatt (CleanGenius/Anpassen), Basisstation, MopExtend™-Einstellungen.
cards.description_es: Tarjeta Dreame Vacuum con interfaz inspirada en la app oficial: mapa, hoja de limpieza (CleanGenius/Personalizar), estación base, ajustes MopExtend™.
cards.description_fr: Carte Dreame Vacuum avec interface inspirée de l'app officielle : carte, fiche de nettoyage (CleanGenius/Personnaliser), station de base, paramètres MopExtend™.

cards.name: Fotovoltaico — Ieri
cards.author: Oikos
cards.description: Riepilogo produzione/consumo/prelievo/cessione del giorno precedente con grafico orario.
cards.description_en: Previous day production/consumption/grid-draw/export summary with hourly chart.
cards.description_de: Tagesrückblick: Produktion/Verbrauch/Netzbezug/Einspeisung des Vortages mit stündlichem Diagramm.
cards.description_es: Resumen del día anterior: producción/consumo/importación/exportación con gráfico horario.
cards.description_fr: Récapitulatif de la veille : production/consommation/soutirage/injection avec graphique horaire.
